lessons: Staff dominates sword users (21 kills in last 6 rounds) — prioritize Warden, Reaper, Fortress, Juggernaut, Valkyrie, GhostProtocol as primary targets.
Reaper and NeuralReaper (staff users) have killed us 4 times with 0 deaths — avoid 1v1 duels; only engage if isolated or below 30% HP.
Spear users (Lancer, Valkyrie) killed us 5 times in last 5 rounds — retreat immediately on sight; their range and mobility outmatch staff in open areas.
Shield + sword combos are lethal (95 shield sightings in round 539) — disengage if shield bot is within 8m of any sword bot; never engage both simultaneously.
Teleport Surge favors staff (3 wins, 0 losses in 4 rounds) — use teleport spawns to flank sword users aggressively; maintain pressure.
Staff win rate drops to 0% in rounds with high spear density (>100 sightings) — avoid open maps when spear usage spikes.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has a 24.3% win rate (36/148) — the highest of all weapons — and is currently shredding sword users with 7 kills in 3 of the last 5 rounds.
